Key Insights & Analysis

Job Market Analytics Dashboard Summary

Analysis of 7,822 job postings from 25 companies (2021-2024) reveals key employment trends with an average salary of ₹75,697 and maximum of ₹199,966.

Top In-Demand Roles

Cybersecurity Analyst leads with 424 postings, followed by Business Analyst (396) and AI Engineer (385). Distribution across top 10 roles is relatively balanced (374-424 postings), indicating broad demand across technical specializations.

Compensation Patterns

Software Engineer commands highest average salary at ₹80,988, followed by Frontend Developer (₹80,952) and Cybersecurity Analyst (₹78,985). Market shows bifurcation: 46.5% of positions pay ₹20-40K while 29.1% exceed ₹100K, with only 24.4% in mid-range.

Skills Landscape

Python dominates with 2,450 mentions (31.3% of postings), followed by SQL (1,479) and Excel (1,019). JavaScript, ML, and Statistics round out core requirements. TensorFlow and PyTorch show equal demand (517 each), indicating framework-agnostic hiring.

Geographic Distribution

Kolkata leads with 993 postings, followed by Remote (945) and Mumbai (925). Pune offers highest average salary (₹77,622) despite fewer postings. Remote positions pay 3.9% below average, suggesting flexibility-compensation trade-off.

Experience Requirements

Entry-level (0 years) accounts for 969 postings; 1,393 jobs specify no experience requirement. Salary progression is non-linear: 1-2 years experience commands ₹76,656-₹77,243, comparable to 10-year veterans (₹77,359), while 5-year experience shows lowest average (₹73,326).

Hiring Trends

Consistent monthly volume of 192-193 postings from 2021-2023 indicates stable demand. 2024 shows 14.5% uptick to 221 postings/month, suggesting accelerating market activity.

Key Recommendations

Master Python and SQL as foundational skills. Target Software Engineer, Frontend Developer, or Cybersecurity Analyst roles for optimal demand-compensation balance. Consider Pune, Mumbai, or Bangalore for highest salaries. Early-career professionals (0-2 years) face strong market with 2,815 postings averaging ₹76,270.
